capabilities.name: Leave Request Management
capabilities.description: The ability for employees to initiate, modify, and cancel leave requests throughout their lifecycle.

functions.name: Submit Leave Request
functions.description: An employee selects a leave type, specifies dates and an optional reason, and submits a request for manager approval.
outcomes: Leave request created in PENDING status
Balance and advance notice validated
Overlap with existing requests checked
Manager notified by email

functions.name: Modify Leave Request
functions.description: An employee edits the dates or reason of an existing leave request. Approved requests revert to PENDING for re-approval.
outcomes: Request updated and version incremented
Status reset to PENDING if previously APPROVED
Manager notified (and HR Admin if was APPROVED)

functions.name: Cancel Leave Request
functions.description: An employee cancels a pending or approved leave request. Balance is restored if the request was approved.
outcomes: Request status set to CANCELLED
Balance restored if request was APPROVED
Manager notified by email

capabilities.name: Approval Workflow
capabilities.description: The ability for managers to review, approve, or reject leave requests submitted by their direct reports.

functions.name: Approve Leave Request
functions.description: A manager approves a pending leave request, triggering balance deduction and employee notification.
outcomes: Request status set to APPROVED
Leave balance deducted for the employee
Employee notified by email

functions.name: Reject Leave Request
functions.description: A manager rejects a pending leave request with an optional comment. No balance change occurs.
outcomes: Request status set to REJECTED
Employee notified by email with optional comment

capabilities.name: Leave Balance Management
capabilities.description: The ability to track, validate, and update leave entitlements per employee and leave type.

functions.name: Validate Leave Balance
functions.description: Before a request is submitted, the system checks the employee has sufficient balance for the requested leave type and duration.
outcomes: Submission blocked if balance insufficient (unless HR Admin override)
Pending days reserved on successful submission

functions.name: Manage Leave Balances
functions.description: HR Admin sets and adjusts leave balance entitlements per employee per leave type per year.
outcomes: Balance record created or updated
Correct entitlement available for validation at submission

capabilities.name: Leave Type Administration
capabilities.description: The ability for HR Admin to define and maintain the catalogue of leave types and their rules.

functions.name: Manage Leave Types
functions.description: HR Admin creates, updates, and deactivates leave types, including their advance notice requirements and balance flags.
outcomes: Leave type catalogue kept current
Advance notice rules enforced at submission for correct leave type

capabilities.name: Notifications
capabilities.description: The ability to automatically email relevant stakeholders when key leave request events occur.

functions.name: Send Event Notifications
functions.description: On each leave lifecycle event, the system determines the correct recipients and dispatches email notifications.
outcomes: Correct stakeholders notified for each event type
Notification delivery status recorded

capabilities.name: History and Audit
capabilities.description: The ability to maintain a full, immutable record of all leave requests and state changes for compliance and reporting.

functions.name: View Leave History
functions.description: Employees view their own leave history; managers and HR Admin view history for their scope.
outcomes: Full leave request history available per employee
Filterable by date, type, and status

functions.name: Maintain Audit Trail
functions.description: Every state change on a leave request is logged immutably with actor, timestamp, and optional snapshot.
outcomes: Complete audit trail available for all requests
Point-in-time state reconstruction possible
